# tfe_azure_oidc_configuration

Generates a new TFE Azure OIDC Configuration.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `client_id` (String) The Client (or Application) ID of your Entra ID application.
- `subscription_id` (String) The ID of your Azure subscription.
- `tenant_id` (String) The Tenant (or Directory) ID of your Entra ID application.

### Optional

- `organization` (String) Name of the organization to which the TFE Azure OIDC configuration belongs.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the Azure OIDC configuration.
